mnemonics: CSV: Comma-Separated Values are a Very common way to save data.
keyPoints: Use pandas.DataFrame.to_csv() to write a DataFrame to a CSV file.
Specify the index=False parameter to avoid writing row numbers to the file.
The pandas library can also write data to other formats like Excel (.xlsx) and Parquet.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to set index=False, resulting in an extra unnamed index column in the output file.
Providing an incorrect file path, which causes a FileNotFoundError or creates a file in an unexpected location.
